verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Missing you already, but I know that you're at rest Smiling through the tears, because you deserve the best And I heard that you reached Glory's side today So allow me to convey

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Congratulations, you have made it To where the angels trod A celebration in the presence Of Almighty God And I sure wish I could be there To hear Him say, "Well done" Congratulations

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Take your crown and wear it, With a robe of purest white You are finally there, The graduation of your life And though I'm left here, With feelings bitter-sweet 'Til we again shall meet

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: 'Til we meet 'Til we meet 'Til we meet at Jesus' Feet
